narrative:
Granville Township B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,032 registered voters, with 45.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
